introSection: Vertika is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter roller coaster at La Récré des 3 Curés in Milizac, Brittany, France. It opened on 6 June 2020.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Vertika is a Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter roller coaster at La Récré des 3 Curés in Milizac, Brittany, France. It opened on 6 June 2020.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 2 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.
